de.uka.ilkd.key.ui

Class MediatorProofControl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractProofControl
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.ui.MediatorProofControl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofControl

    public class MediatorProofControl
extends AbstractProofControl
    A ProofControl which performs the automode in a SwingWorker.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void fireAutoModeStarted(ProofEvent e)
      fires the event that automatic execution has started
      void fireAutoModeStopped(ProofEvent e)
      fires the event that automatic execution has stopped
      boolean isAutoModeSupported(Proof proof)
      Checks if the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl supports the given Proof.
      boolean isInAutoMode()
      Checks if the auto mode is currently running.

      Runs the given ProofMacro at the given PosInOccurrence on the given Node.

      void startAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, ProverTaskListener ptl)
      void stopAutoMode()
      Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.
      void waitWhileAutoMode()
      Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

      • stopAutoMode

        public void stopAutoMode()
        Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.

      • waitWhileAutoMode

        public void waitWhileAutoMode()
        Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

      • isInAutoMode

        public boolean isInAutoMode()
        Checks if the auto mode is currently running.
        Returns:
        true auto mode is running, false auto mode is not running.

      • isAutoModeSupported

        public boolean isAutoModeSupported(Proof proof)
        Checks if the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl supports the given Proof.
        Specified by:
        isAutoModeSupported in interface ProofControl
        Overrides:
        isAutoModeSupported in class AbstractProofControl
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to check.
        Returns:
        true auto mode support proofs, false auto mode don't support proof.

      • runMacro

        public void runMacro(Node node,
                     ProofMacro macro,
                     PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
        Runs the given ProofMacro at the given PosInOccurrence on the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to start macro at.
        macro - The ProofMacro to execute.
        posInOcc - The exact PosInOccurrence at which the ProofMacro is started at.
